required_disclosure: data_field_enrichment_v1 is a conditional enrichment layer
blocked fields are excluded from downstream research until remediation is completed
forbidden_downstream_usage: promotion of conditional_pass to full pass
silent fallback from trading-day fields to calendar-day proxies
fail_fast_conditions: fail fast if downstream code references listing_age_trading_days
fail fast if downstream code references newly_listed_flag
fail fast if a blocked field is routed into model, baseline, challenger, portfolio, or screening code paths
fail fast if any code attempts to promote conditional_pass to full pass
fail fast if any code attempts silent fallback to a calendar-day proxy
fail fast if frozen test access is requested or observed
